---
title: "Juliana Herrera Pérez"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/juliana.jpeg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:juliana.herrera@posgrado.ecologia.edu.mx)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**PhD Student**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Ichthyology]{.profile-tag} [Macroecology]{.profile-tag} [Macroevolution]{.profile-tag}

I am a Biologist from the University of Antioquia and obtained my master's degree there as well. For the past eight years I have worked with aquatic ecosystems in the northern Andes, from fish community ecology to population genetics and phylogeography. As a PhD student at INECOL, I study how morphological and ecological traits of freshwater fish species have influenced their diversification on a global scale.

### Education

- **PhD** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (ongoing)
- **MSc** — Universidad de Antioquia, Colombia (2021)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
